Interface Assets

public interface Assets
A set of assets (textures and sounds) with names. Can be queried by name and index.

Note for Scratchers: The indexes, unlike in Scratch, are starting from 0 and NOT 1. Also, this interface is used both by stages and sprites, so the respective asset names (costumes for sprites, backdrops for stages) are unified under the term "textures".

See Also:
  • Constants.ROOT

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    Assets.NamedAsset
    An asset pointer with a name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Assets
    empty()
    Returns an empty assets instance (one empty texture named default and no sounds).
    static Assets
    fromLoaded(List<? extends Assets.NamedAsset> textures, List<? extends Assets.NamedAsset> sounds)
    Creates and returns a Assets instance with contents of the given lists.
    static Assets
    resolve(Path texturesDir, Path soundsDir)
    Creates and returns a Assets instance with resolved assets from the given textures and sounds directories.
    List<Assets.NamedAsset>
    soundsByIndex()
    Returns an immutable list of sounds.
    it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.objects.Object2IntFunction<String>
    soundsIndexesByName()
    Returns a function that maps sound names to sound indexes, and returns value less than 0 for absent names.
    List<Assets.NamedAsset>
    texturesByIndex()
    Returns an immutable list of textures.
    it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.objects.Object2IntFunction<String>
    texturesIndexesByName()
    Returns a function that maps texture names to texture indexes, and returns value less than 0 for absent names.

  • Method Details

    • texturesByIndex

      List<Assets.NamedAsset> texturesByIndex()
      Returns an immutable list of textures.
      Returns:
      textures to query by index

    • texturesIndexesByName

      it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.objects.Object2IntFunction<String> texturesIndexesByName()
      Returns a function that maps texture names to texture indexes, and returns value less than 0 for absent names.
      Returns:
      indexes to query by name

    • soundsByIndex

      List<Assets.NamedAsset> soundsByIndex()
      Returns an immutable list of sounds.
      Returns:
      sounds to query by index

    • soundsIndexesByName

      it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.objects.Object2IntFunction<String> soundsIndexesByName()
      Returns a function that maps sound names to sound indexes, and returns value less than 0 for absent names.
      Returns:
      sound indexes to query by name

    • fromLoaded

      static Assets fromLoaded(List<? extends Assets.NamedAsset> textures, List<? extends Assets.NamedAsset> sounds)
      Creates and returns a Assets instance with contents of the given lists.
      Parameters:
      textures - the texture list
      sounds - the sound list
      Returns:
      a new Assets
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if one of the elements is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if there was a duplicate texture/sound name

    • resolve

      static Assets resolve(Path texturesDir, Path soundsDir)
      Creates and returns a Assets instance with resolved assets from the given textures and sounds directories. The name of each asset will be the same as the file name, but without the last filename extension.

      Note: files will only be read directly from the given directories, not recursively. The order of assets will be undefined.

      Special handling for empty textures' directory: there will be only one empty SVG texture.

      Parameters:
      texturesDir - path to the textures directory
      soundsDir - path to the sounds directory
      Returns:
      a new resolved Assets
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if one of the given paths does not locate a directory
      NullPointerException - if one of the paths is null
      UncheckedIOException - if one of the directories could not be opened

    • empty

      static Assets empty()
      Returns an empty assets instance (one empty texture named default and no sounds).
      Returns:
      empty assets
